meta.description: A live notification channel registered against a UUID.

targetId.description: UUID of the item being watched.

channel.description: Notification channel configuration. type determines which additional fields are required.

type.description: Channel type. webhook: HTTP POST to url. mcp: notify an active MCP session. reactive: notify a reactive Studio component.

url.description: webhook: endpoint URL. Use $VAR syntax for secrets — never inline credentials.

secret.description: webhook: HMAC-SHA256 signing secret. Use $VAR syntax. If set, the adapter signs the request body and includes the signature in X-Kanecta-Signature.

sessionId.description: mcp: ID of the active MCP session to deliver notifications to.

componentId.description: reactive: UUID of the Studio component to notify. The component re-renders on delivery.

events.description: Which events trigger notification. 'create' — item created. 'update' — item updated. 'delete' — item deleted. 'children' — a child item added or removed. At least one required.

filter.description: Optional expression (same DSL as runIf and forEach.filter) evaluated against the event before delivery. Variables: event.type (the event kind), event.item (the item after the change), event.delta (field-level diff). Only events where the filter evaluates to true trigger a notification. Null means deliver all matching events. Example: "event.delta['payload.status'].to = 'done'".

recursive.description: When true, the subscription also fires for changes to any descendant of targetId in the primary tree, not just the item itself. Default false.

active.description: Whether this subscription is currently active. False suppresses delivery without deleting the subscription. Default true. Set to false to pause a subscription. The adapter also sets this to false when expiresAt is reached.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime after which the adapter automatically sets active to false. Null means no expiry.

principal.description: Identity of who registered this subscription. Free-form string matching the adapter's identity format (email, username, UUID). Used for audit and notification routing.

sqlSchema: -- Built-in type: adapter handles storage natively.
